{"society_power": 8.0, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "2019 estallido social and two failed constitutional rewrites", "reasoning": "The 2019 explosion showed massive mobilization capacity, but the erosion of durable party intermediaries and two failed constitutional plebiscites left society vibrant yet unable to consolidate a new bargain, slightly lowering organized society power; declining institutional trust and contested police legitimacy amid persistent capacity modestly weakened the state."}
